name: NATIONAL PRESTO INDUSTRIES INC
summary: National Presto Industries operates three segments: Housewares/Small Appliance (pressure cookers, kitchen electrics, comfort appliances sold primarily in the US and Canada); Defense (manufactures 40mm ammunition, cartridge cases, detonators, and performs Load, Assemble and Pack operations for the US Department of Defense and prime contractors); and Safety (smoke, carbon monoxide alarms and PFAS-Free Foam fire extinguishers via startup Rely Innovations, Inc.).

products.name: Pressure Cookers and Canners
products.description: Stovetop and digital pressure cookers and canners in aluminum and stainless steel for consumer use.

products.name: Kitchen Electrics
products.description: Skillets, griddles, deep fryers, waffle makers, pizza ovens, coffeemakers, corn poppers, dehydrators, and more.

products.name: Electric Heaters
products.description: Comfort appliances including electric heaters sold under the Housewares/Small Appliance segment.

products.name: 40mm Ammunition
products.description: Practice and tactical 40mm ammunition manufactured for the US Army under prime contractor agreements.

products.name: Medium Caliber Cartridge Cases
products.description: 20mm, 25mm, 30mm, 40mm, and 50mm cartridge cases for DOD and prime contractors, made by Amron division.

products.name: Detonators and Energetic Devices
products.description: Detonators, booster pellets, release cartridges, lead azide, and other military energetic devices made by Tech Ord.

products.name: Precision Mechanical and Electro-Mechanical Assemblies
products.description: Niche ordnance products including fuzes, firing devices, and initiators for DOD and prime contractors.

products.name: LAP Operations
products.description: Load, Assemble and Pack operations on ordnance-related products for the US Government and prime contractors via Spectra.

products.name: Metal Parts and Assemblies
products.description: Metal parts and assemblies for DOD and prime contractors manufactured by Woodlawn.

products.name: Smoke and CO Alarms
products.description: Smoke, carbon monoxide, and combo alarms with English/Spanish voice messages and digital displays via Rely Innovations.

products.name: PFAS-Free Foam Fire Extinguisher
products.description: Commercial fire extinguisher using PFAS-free foam, marketed under the Safety segment.

products.name: M918E2 TP-DNT Cartridge
products.description: 40mm High Velocity Target Practice cartridge visible day/night and through thermal/night vision sights.

partnerships.description: Major retail customer accounting for 10% and 11% of consolidated net sales in 2024 and 2023 respectively.
Prime contractor relationship for 40mm ammunition system contracts spanning multiple multi-year awards.
